concepts.title: Joint, marginal, and conditional distributions
concepts.hook: Foundation for graphical models and probabilistic inference.

concepts.title: Graphical models and d-separation
concepts.hook: Encode conditional independencies; critical for understanding causal assumptions in DAGs.

concepts.title: Prior selection and sensitivity analysis
concepts.hook: "Objective" vs "subjective" priors; robustness to prior choice matters.

concepts.title: Empirical Bayes
concepts.hook: Estimate hyperpriors from data; shrinks estimates toward global mean.

concepts.title: Hierarchical models
concepts.hook: Pool information across groups; improves small-sample estimates.

concepts.title: Model comparison and cross-validation
concepts.hook: AIC, BIC, LOO-CV; trade-offs in model selection.
